description: Add PostTypeCard constant to model/post.go
how_to_test: Run: go test ./public/model/ -run TestPostIsValid -v — card type should be accepted by IsValid()

description: Add PostTypeCard to IsValid() switch case in model/post.go
how_to_test: Run: go test ./public/model/ -run TestPostIsValid -v — creating a Post with Type='card' should not return a validation error

description: Add postsQueryUnfiltered field to SqlPostStore struct and initialize both builders in newSqlPostStore
how_to_test: Run: cd server && go build ./... — should compile without errors

description: postsQuery base builder excludes card posts by default
how_to_test: Any function using s.postsQuery should automatically exclude card posts. Verified transitively by testing each function below that uses postsQuery.

description: GetSingle (line 909) uses postsQueryUnfiltered — returns card posts when fetched by ID
how_to_test: Insert a card post via SQL, call GetSingle with its ID — should return the card post. Then call GetSingle with a normal post ID — should also return it.

description: GetEditHistoryForPost (line 2514) uses postsQueryUnfiltered — returns edit history for card posts
how_to_test: Run: go test ./channels/store/sqlstore/ -run TestGetEditHistoryForPost -v — should pass. Also verify a card post's edit history is retrievable.

description: getPostWithCollapsedThreads (line 610) excludes card posts via postsQuery (line 643)
how_to_test: Insert a card post in a channel. Call Get() with CollapsedThreads=true — the card post should not appear in the thread list returned.

description: getPostsCollapsedThreads (line 1312) excludes card posts — add .Where(sq.NotEq) after line 1331
how_to_test: Insert a card post in a channel. Call GetPosts with CollapsedThreads=true — card should not appear in results.

description: getPostsSinceCollapsedThreads (line 1396) excludes card posts — add .Where(sq.NotEq) after line 1414
how_to_test: Insert a card post in a channel. Call GetPostsSince with CollapsedThreads=true — card should not appear in results.

description: GetPostsSince CTE query (line 1452) excludes card posts — add AND Posts.Type != 'card' in CTE WHERE (line 1457)
how_to_test: Insert a card post in a channel. Call GetPostsSince without collapsed threads — card should not appear in results.

description: GetPostsSinceForSync (line 1507) excludes card posts via postsQuery
how_to_test: Insert a card post. Call GetPostsSinceForSync — card should not appear in sync results.

description: GetPostsForReporting (line 1590) excludes card posts via postsQuery
how_to_test: Insert a card post. Call GetPostsForReporting — card should not appear in reporting results.

description: GetPostsByThread (line 1672) excludes card posts via postsQuery
how_to_test: Create a thread with a normal root post. Insert a card post as a reply (same RootId). Call GetPostsByThread — card reply should not appear.

description: getPostsAround (line 1687) excludes card posts — add sq.NotEq to conditions (line 1724)
how_to_test: Insert a card post between two normal posts. Call GetPostsBefore and GetPostsAfter — card should not appear in pagination results.

description: GetPostAfterTime (line 1836) excludes card posts via postsQuery
how_to_test: Insert a card post at a specific time with no other posts after it. Call GetPostAfterTime with a time before the card — should return nil or next non-card post.

description: getRootPosts (line 1860) excludes card posts — all 4 raw SQL variants (lines 1866-1873)
how_to_test: Insert a card post in a channel. Call GetPosts (non-collapsed, skipFetchThreads=true and false, includeDeleted=true and false) — card should not appear in any variant.

description: getParentsPosts (line 1884) excludes card posts — inner subquery (line 1918) and outer WHERE (line 1924)
how_to_test: Insert a card post in a channel with threaded posts. Call GetPosts (non-collapsed) — card should not appear in parent posts.

description: getFlaggedPosts (line 525) excludes card posts — add AND Posts.Type != 'card' (line 553)
how_to_test: Flag a card post via Preferences. Call GetFlaggedPostsForUser — card should not appear in flagged results.

description: search() function (line 2146) excludes card posts — add filter after system post filter (line 2161)
how_to_test: Create a card post with unique searchable text. Run SearchPostsForUser with that text — card should not appear in search results.

description: GetPostsByIds (line 2495) excludes card posts — add .Where(sq.NotEq) (line 2500)
how_to_test: Insert a card post and a normal post. Call GetPostsByIds with both IDs — only the normal post should be returned.

description: GetPostsBatchForIndexing (line 2530) excludes card posts — add AND Posts.Type != 'card' (line 2550)
how_to_test: Insert a card post. Call GetPostsBatchForIndexing covering that time range — card should not appear in indexing batch.

description: GetRepliesForExport (line 2719) excludes card posts via postsQuery
how_to_test: Create a thread with a card post as a reply. Call GetRepliesForExport — card reply should not appear in export.

description: AnalyticsUserCountsWithPostsByDay (~line 2298) excludes card posts — add AND Posts.Type != 'card'
how_to_test: Insert card posts for a user on a given day. Call AnalyticsUserCountsWithPostsByDay — card posts should not inflate the count.

description: Get() single post by ID (line 747, raw SQL) is LEFT UNFILTERED — returns card posts
how_to_test: Insert a card post. Call Get() with that post ID — should successfully return the card post (this is intentional, targeted lookup by known ID).

description: GetPostsCreatedAt (line 2483, raw SQL) is LEFT UNFILTERED — returns card posts
how_to_test: Insert a card post at a specific CreateAt. Call GetPostsCreatedAt with that timestamp and channel — should return the card post.

description: Delete operations (PermanentDeleteByUser, PermanentDeleteByChannel, PermanentDeleteBatch) are LEFT UNFILTERED — can delete card posts
how_to_test: Insert a card post. Call PermanentDeleteByChannel for that channel — card post should be deleted. Verify post no longer exists.

description: GetOldest (line 2608) is LEFT UNFILTERED — may return card posts
how_to_test: Insert a card post with the earliest CreateAt. Call GetOldest — should return the card post (system-level query, intentionally unfiltered).

description: GetNthRecentPostTime (line 1933) is LEFT UNFILTERED — already filters Type=''
how_to_test: Run: go test ./channels/store/sqlstore/ -run TestGetNthRecentPostTime -v — should pass unchanged.

description: SetPostReminder existence check (line 3177) is LEFT UNFILTERED — can set reminders on card posts
how_to_test: Insert a card post. Call SetPostReminder for that post — should succeed.

description: Thread metadata subqueries (reply counts at lines 3097-3114) are LEFT UNFILTERED
how_to_test: Create a thread with normal replies. Verify reply count is correct. Thread metadata queries are internal bookkeeping and should count all post types.

description: Full integration: card posts are invisible in channel feed end-to-end
how_to_test: Start server. Insert a card post via SQL INSERT into a channel. Hit GET /api/v4/channels/{id}/posts — card should not appear. Hit GET /api/v4/posts/{card_id} — card should be returned (single get is unfiltered).
